scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run i18n:pot
scripts.build:all: npm run build:assets && npm run build:i18n
scripts.build:i18n: npm run i18n:pot && npm run i18n:clearpot
scripts.i18n:clearpot: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dir='languages';for(const file of fs.readdirSync(dir)){if(!file.endsWith('.pot'))continue;const full=path.join(dir,file);const data=fs.readFileSync(full,'utf8').split('\n');const newData=data.filter(line=>!line.startsWith('\"POT-Creation-Date:'));fs.writeFileSync(full,newData.join('\n'));}"
